description_long: This necklace features a striking arrangement of large, red, cylindrical beads interspersed with five prominent star-shaped ornaments. Each star is intricately constructed with alternating red and white segments, adorned with a dotted pattern that adds visual texture and complexity. The necklace is strung together with a visible thread or wire, ensuring the elements are evenly spaced and symmetrically aligned. The red beads are smooth and slightly glossy, contrasting with the more detailed and textured star motifs. The overall design is bold and festive, likely intended to make a statement as a decorative accessory. The piece is displayed on a neutral, matte bust, highlighting its vibrant colors and geometric motif.
description: A bold necklace with large red beads and five intricate, red-and-white star-shaped ornaments, featuring a festive geometric motif. The design is visually striking and highly decorative.
description_view_0: Front view shows the full necklace with all five star-shaped ornaments and red beads clearly visible, symmetrically arranged.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the depth and thickness of the beads and stars, with some stars partially visible along the curve.
description_view_2: Rear view displays only the red beads encircling the neck, with the star ornaments not visible from this angle.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the profile of the necklace with the stars and beads along the curve.
